scenes.visual_prompt: Ancient Ethiopian highlands, a goat herder discovering red coffee berries on a bush, warm golden light, storybook illustration style
scenes.script_line: In the ninth century, an Ethiopian goat herder named Kaldi noticed his goats dancing after eating red berries from a strange bush.

scenes.visual_prompt: coffee beans roasting in traditional roaster close up
scenes.script_line: Those berries would become the most traded commodity on Earth after oil.
Today, the world drinks two point two five billion cups of coffee every single day.

scenes.visual_prompt: busy coffee shop interior with people working on laptops warm lighting
scenes.script_line: Coffee houses became the birthplace of the Enlightenment, the French Revolution, and Silicon Valley startup culture.

scenes.visual_prompt: A steaming cup of coffee on a desk next to a world map with trade routes drawn in golden light, warm editorial illustration
scenes.script_line: All because one goat herder noticed his goats were dancing.
